creator: pprocacci@gmail.com
text:
Resolves: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=238805

Attached patch includes 2 new ports as they are dependencies to p5-Paws.

New:
devel/p5-Config-AWS
devel/p5-DataStruct-Flat

Updates:
devel/p5-Paws

I think the maintainer is long gone.  If you read the previous bug reports concerning p5-Paws, you'll notice this is my second attempt to get it updated.
